Vincent Tarzia, the newly elected leader of the Liberal Party in South Australia, says he did not undermine the previous leader, David Speirs, and promised bold policies as he heads towards the March 2026 state election.

The Greens will pressure the Albanese government to introduce a ban on gambling advertising by amending legislation due to be debated in the Senate this week.
